nasb.text: So I said to the angel who was speaking with me, “What are these?” And he answered me, “These are the horns which have scattered Judah, Israel and Jerusalem.”

esv.text: And I said to the angel who talked with me, “What are these?” And he said to me, “These are the horns that have scattered Judah, Israel, and Jerusalem.”

cnv.text: 於是我問那與我說話的天使：“這些是甚麼？”他對我說：“這些就是把猶大、以色列和耶路撒冷趕散的角。”

ccb.text: 于是，我问与我说话的天使：“这是什么？”他回答说：“这些是驱散犹大、以色列和耶路撒冷的角。”
